queries.question: List the technique names for every data analyst.
queries.sql: SELECT Techniques.technique_name  from Data_Analysts_Techniques join Techniques on Data_Analysts_Techniques.technique_id = Techniques.id join Data_Analysts on Data_Analysts_Techniques.data_analyst_id = Data_Analysts.id   GROUP BY Data_Analysts_Techniques.technique_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Data_Analysts_Techniques.data_analyst_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Data_Analysts)

queries.question: List the technique names for every data analyst.
queries.sql: select data_analysts.name , techniques.technique_name from Data_Analysts_Techniques join Techniques on Data_Analysts_Techniques.technique_id = Techniques.id join Data_Analysts on Data_Analysts_Techniques.data_analyst_id = Data_Analysts.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?technique_name WHERE {
  ?data_analysts_techniques a :Data_Analysts_Techniques .
  ?techniques a :Techniques .
  ?data_analysts_techniques p:hasTechniques ?techniques .
  ?data_analysts a :Data_Analysts .
  ?data_analysts_techniques p:hasData_Analysts ?data_analysts .
  ?data_analysts p:name ?name .
  ?techniques p:technique_name ?technique_name .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: List the technique names for every data analyst.
